expectations.evidence: Report [Important]: 'Domain model now depends directly on database/sql infrastructure... LoadOrderFromDB introduces DB concerns into domain package.'

Export audit: 'No cross-package references: LoadOrderFromDB, ValidateOrderMinimum, FormatPrice, GetShippingZip, GetOrderSummary. Has cross-package reference: CalculateOrderTotal.' All 5 unnecessary exports caught, CalculateOrderTotal correctly excluded.
Refactoring: 'Removed transient caller-specific comment' on LoadOrderFromDB and FormatPrice.
Refactoring: 'Reduced method-chain coupling in GetOrderSummary by reusing GetShippingZip(order).'
Report [Critical]: 'domain→service import creates an import cycle and breaks builds.'
